canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Welcome
canonical.description: Institutional-grade trading tools. God Mode simulation, Swarm AI, Market Intel, and more.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Dashboard
canonical.description: A calmer trading workspace for scanning, planning, execution, and review.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Market
canonical.description: Analyze symbols, manage your watchlist, and review market context in one place.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Plan
canonical.description: Build a setup, grade it, size the risk, and keep saved trade plans organized.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Execute
canonical.description: Open and manage paper trades, track portfolio exposure, and check broker readiness.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Review
canonical.description: Journal trades, study performance, and set better rules for the next session.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Sign In
canonical.description: Sign in to connect your Alpaca account and save your trading workspace.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Prediction Markets
canonical.description: Live event contracts and sentiment odds.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Backtest Simulator
canonical.description: Train your edge by replaying historical price action.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | Analytics
canonical.description: Portfolio performance breakdown, equity curve, win rates, and P&L calendar.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | TradingView Crash Course
canonical.description: Master the platform in 30 minutes and start paper trading today.

canonical.title: Day Trader OS | God Mode
canonical.description: Institutional Monte Carlo Simulation and probability engine.
